title: Quantum Oracle Sketching — Matrix Block Encoding
subtitle: Sketched matrix-element + matrix-index oracles assembled into a QSVT-ready block encoding of an arbitrary sparse matrix
description: Extends quantum oracle sketching from Boolean / vector inputs to matrix block encodings. Sketches the matrix-element phase oracle from classical samples (i_t, j_t, A_{i_t j_t}), assembles a Hadamard-test-based block encoding of A, verifies the N^2 / M error scaling, and previews the QSVT polynomial design used downstream by the LS-SVM and PCA notebooks.
